get.summary: List Hub and/or Runner plugin inventory for the current namespace.
List plugin diagnostics for Hub or Runner targets.
List recent namespace, agent, and workspace values for descriptor option sources.
List user-facing plugin capabilities aggregated across Web, Hub, and Runner parts.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Optional session id used to resolve session-runner capability parts.

post.summary: Reload all plugins on the selected target.
Install a plugin from a target-local directory.
Inspect a package upload and return an install plan derived from manifest positions and Hub/Runner compatibility.
Execute a previously created manifest-driven install plan.
Legacy target-scoped package install. Prefer install-plan for manifest-driven cross-runtime installs.

get.summary: List marketplace catalog entries and installed state.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Optional text search over id, name, description, repo, and keywords.

parameters.name: runtime
parameters.description: Optional runtime filter, for example hub or runner.

post.summary: Refresh the marketplace catalog cache and return the latest entries.
Create a manifest-driven install plan for a marketplace plugin release.
Install a marketplace plugin release after plan validation.
Browse a target-local directory for plugin install UI.

get.summary: Inspect one plugin on Hub or one Runner target.

delete.summary: Delete one plugin from a user-owned plugin install directory.

post.summary: Reload one plugin on the selected target.
Send a synthetic test notification through one active Hub notification plugin.
Enable one plugin with optional non-secret config.

patch.summary: Replace one plugin scoped config object and reload by default.

toolPaths.description: Reserved for future structured tool resolution; current Runner emits a warning and does not apply this field.
